data.title: Shanghai Biren Tech Reshapes Board With Independent Director Change
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6082) ).

Shanghai Biren Technology announced the resignation of independent non-executive director Dr. Yuan Wang, who will step down from the board and its key committees following the election of a successor at the upcoming annual general meeting. The company emphasized that Dr. Wang’s departure is due to work arrangements, with no disagreements with the board or issues requiring shareholder attention.

The board has proposed appointing microelectronics expert Dr. Zhiyi Yu as an independent non-executive director and member of the audit, nomination and remuneration committees, subject to approval at the AGM. His appointment, backed by extensive IC and AI chip R&D credentials and an annual fee of RMB700,000, is intended to strengthen Biren’s governance and technical oversight as it advances its semiconductor strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6082) stock is a Buy with a HK$54.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:6082 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Shanghai Biren Technology Co., Ltd. is a China-based semiconductor company focused on high-performance integrated circuits and artificial intelligence chips. Listed in Hong Kong, the group targets advanced computing applications, leveraging deep R&D capabilities to compete in the rapidly evolving AI hardware and microelectronics market.

Average Trading Volume: 10,340,972

Current Market Cap: HK$69.7B

data.title: Changmao Biochemical Posts Another Annual Loss and Scraps Final Dividend for 2025
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Changmao Biochemical Engineering Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:0954) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Changmao Biochemical Engineering Company Limited reported 2025 revenue of RMB556.9 million, down slightly from a year earlier, and a loss attributable to shareholders of RMB66.8 million, broadly in line with 2024. The board has decided not to recommend a final dividend for the year, underscoring continued earnings pressure.

Despite modestly improving gross profit and lower administrative expenses that narrowed the operating loss, higher finance costs weighed on the bottom line and kept the group in the red. The results highlight ongoing profitability challenges and balance-sheet pressure for the biochemical producer, with shareholders facing another year without a cash payout as management prioritises financial stability.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0954) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Changmao Biochemical Engineering Co. Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:0954 Stock Forecast page.

More about Changmao Biochemical Engineering Co. Ltd. Class H

Changmao Biochemical Engineering Company Limited is a PRC-incorporated biochemical producer listed in Hong Kong, operating in the specialty chemicals sector. The group manufactures and sells biochemical products, with revenue largely derived from industrial customers, and is exposed to raw material costs, financing expenses and demand trends in its niche markets.

data.title: NSING Technologies Narrows 2025 Loss as Revenue and Margins Improve
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NSING Technologies Inc. Class H ( (HK:2701) ) has issued an announcement.

NSING Technologies Inc. reported a 16.5% year-on-year increase in revenue to RMB1.36 billion for 2025, driven mainly by sales of goods and services, while gross profit rose 36.1% to RMB248.3 million, lifting gross margin to 18.3%. The company significantly narrowed its annual loss to RMB117.6 million from RMB255.7 million as administrative and research expenses declined and other losses were reduced, signaling improving operating efficiency despite continued finance costs.

Earnings per share improved, with basic loss per share shrinking to RMB0.2 from RMB0.4, reflecting the reduced loss attributable to shareholders. The results indicate that, although the group remains loss-making, its financial performance is on a clear recovery path, which may strengthen stakeholder confidence in its efforts to enhance profitability and better manage costs.

More about NSING Technologies Inc. Class H

NSING Technologies Inc. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong. The group is engaged in the sale of goods and services, with a revenue model that also includes lease income, positioning it within the broader technology and industrial solutions market in China.

Current Market Cap: HK$9.09B

data.title: Hepalink 2025 Profit Falls on API Weakness Despite Modest Revenue Growth
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:9989) ) has shared an update.

Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group reported 2025 revenue of RMB5.44 billion, up slightly from a year earlier, with growth driven mainly by its finished dose pharmaceutical products business, whose sales rose to RMB3.50 billion and achieved a higher gross margin. However, group gross profit slipped to RMB1.68 billion and the overall gross margin narrowed as the active pharmaceutical ingredients segment suffered a sharp revenue decline and margin compression, while CDMO sales were flat but somewhat more profitable.

Net profit attributable to shareholders dropped to RMB349.5 million as other income fell sharply and impairment losses and operating expenses weighed on earnings, though finance costs decreased and associates swung to a small gain. The board proposed a lower final cash dividend of RMB1.45 per ten shares, implying a higher payout ratio, signaling continued shareholder returns despite profit pressure and underscoring a strategic tilt toward finished dose products and CDMO to offset weakness in APIs.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9989) stock is a Buy with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:9989 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. Class H

Shenzhen Hepalink Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. is a China-based pharmaceutical company focused on finished dosage drugs, active pharmaceutical ingredients and contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) services. The group targets both domestic and international markets, with a portfolio spanning injectable therapies and heparin-related products across multiple therapeutic areas.

data.title: Hydrogen Capital Growth Wins Shareholder Backing to Delist and Go Private
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc ( (GB:HGEN) ) is now available.

Hydrogen Capital Growth plc shareholders have approved resolutions to cancel the listing of the company’s ordinary shares from the Official List and trading on the Main Market, with the last day of trading expected to be 29 April 2026 and the cancellation effective on 30 April 2026. Investors also backed plans to re-register the business as a private limited company under the new name Hydrogen Capital Growth Limited and adopt new articles of association, marking a strategic shift away from the public markets that will alter liquidity and governance arrangements for existing shareholders.

At the general meeting, both resolutions passed by poll with around 78% of votes cast in favour and roughly 22% against, representing 58.9% of the company’s issued share capital. The move underscores a decisive change in corporate structure as the company exits the London Stock Exchange, potentially concentrating control among remaining investors and reshaping its capital-raising options and reporting obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HGEN) stock is a Hold with a £12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc stock, see the GB:HGEN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HGEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HGEN is a Neutral.

The score is driven down primarily by volatile profitability and multi-year negative operating/free cash flow, with the technical picture also weak due to a pronounced downtrend and negative MACD. The main stabilizing factor is the debt-free balance sheet, but a negative P/E and no stated dividend yield limit valuation support.

To see Spark’s full report on HGEN stock, click here.

More about Hydrogenone Capital Growth Plc

Hydrogen Capital Growth plc is a closed-ended investment company focused on the hydrogen sector, with its ordinary shares listed on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange in the closed-ended investment funds category. The company offers investors exposure to hydrogen-related assets and technologies, targeting growth opportunities in the emerging clean energy and hydrogen economy.

data.title: System1 Director Conrad Bona Raises Stake with Share Purchase
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

System1 ( (GB:SYS1) ) has issued an update.

System1 Group PLC reported that non-executive director Conrad Bona has increased his stake in the company by purchasing 11,288 ordinary shares at £2.75 each on 30 March 2026. Following this transaction, Bona now holds 40,000 shares, representing about 0.3% of System1’s total voting rights, a move that marginally boosts insider ownership and may be viewed as a signal of board-level confidence in the business.

The transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, was disclosed under EU Market Abuse Regulation rules governing dealings by persons discharging managerial responsibilities. System1 reiterated that further information about the group and its investor relations is available via its corporate website, with its advisers and brokers remaining the primary contacts for market participants and shareholders.

The latest announcement is out from Puma Aim VCT PLC ( (GB:PAIM) ).

Puma AIM VCT plc has admitted 1,232,726 new ordinary shares of £0.01 each to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, following a recent subscription offer to investors. With these fully fungible shares now listed as of 30 March 2026, the company’s total ordinary share capital in issue has risen to 9,302,676, modestly expanding its capital base and potential investment capacity for future portfolio growth.

The newly admitted shares form part of the VCT’s ongoing fundraising under a prospectus first published in September 2025 and subsequently supplemented later that year and in early 2026. This incremental issuance underscores continued investor demand for the trust’s strategy and may enhance liquidity in the stock, offering existing and new shareholders improved marketability of their holdings while supporting the VCT’s mandate to back AIM and smaller UK companies.

More about Puma Aim VCT PLC

Puma AIM VCT plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust investing primarily in smaller, growth-oriented companies whose shares are traded on the London Stock Exchange’s AIM market and related venues. The trust offers investors tax-efficient exposure to a diversified portfolio of early-stage and emerging businesses within the UK equity market.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Banco di Desio e Della Brianza SPA ( (IT:BDB) ) has issued an update.

Banco di Desio e della Brianza has made available to the public the explanatory reports for its upcoming ordinary shareholders’ meeting, covering the approval of the 2025 separate and consolidated financial statements, the group sustainability report, and the proposed allocation of profits. The documentation also addresses an extraordinary contribution under the 2026 Budget Law, the 2026 remuneration and incentive policies including a phantom share plan for top management and key personnel, the appointment of an honorary chairman, and a proposed increase in the fees paid to auditing firm KPMG, underscoring ongoing attention to governance, compliance, and alignment of executive incentives with shareholder interests.

The reports can be consulted on the bank’s website and on the 1Info storage platform, ensuring transparency and access for shareholders and other stakeholders ahead of the meeting. These disclosures highlight the bank’s effort to strengthen governance structures and remuneration frameworks while complying with evolving regulatory requirements, which may influence investor perception and oversight of management performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:BDB) stock is a Hold with a EUR9.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco di Desio e Della Brianza SPA stock, see the IT:BDB Stock Forecast page.

More about Banco di Desio e Della Brianza SPA

Banco di Desio e della Brianza S.p.A. is an Italian banking group headquartered in Desio, operating under ABI code 3440/5 and registered in the national register of banking groups. The bank provides retail and commercial banking services and is a member of the Interbank Deposit Protection Fund and the National Guarantee Fund, serving customers primarily in the Italian market.

data.title: Neotech Metals Wins Ontario Grant to Expand Rare Earth Drilling at Hecla-Kilmer
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Caravan Energy Corp. ( (TSE:NTMC) ) is now available.

Neotech Metals Corp., a rare earth and rare metals exploration company, has secured up to C$200,000 in funding under Ontario’s Junior Exploration Program to support 2025 exploration spending at its wholly owned Hecla-Kilmer apatite-hosted rare earth and niobium project near the Otter Rapids hydroelectric facility. The grant, covering up to half of eligible expenditures, allows Neotech to expand drilling to more distal targets across a nine-kilometre geophysical anomaly while reducing capital risk, reinforcing provincial backing for strategic critical mineral assets in Canada.

The company also reported completing about 8,000 metres of drilling at Hecla-Kilmer in 2025 and re-logging and re-assaying 1,900 metres of historical core from a previous operator, with all results to feed into a maiden resource estimate expected in 2026. Assay results from this work are pending, and the expanded campaign positions Neotech to better define the project’s rare earth potential, which could enhance its standing within Canada’s emerging critical minerals supply chain.

More about Caravan Energy Corp.

Neotech Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on discovering and developing rare earth elements and rare metals in promising jurisdictions worldwide. The company emphasizes environmental stewardship and sustainable practices and holds a 100% interest in three key projects: the Hecla-Kilmer rare earth and niobium project in Ontario, and the TREO and Foothills projects in British Columbia, all located near existing infrastructure such as hydroelectric power and railway access.

Average Trading Volume: 87,503

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$22.16M

Learn more about NTMC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: MediPharm Labs Boosts International Medical Cannabis Revenue and Tightens Costs in 2025
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MediPharm Labs ( (TSE:LABS) ) just unveiled an update.

MediPharm Labs reported 2025 revenue of $45.1 million, up 8% year over year, with international medical cannabis sales rising 43% to $25.2 million and accounting for more than half of total revenue. Management highlighted a strengthened balance sheet with $10.8 million in cash, virtually no debt, and continued momentum in Canadian and international medical channels.

The company expanded its product portfolio with new Beacon and Wildlife offerings and novel metered dose inhalers in Australia and Canada, while opening new market pathways through first commercial shipments to France and Brazil and regulatory approvals with a partner in New Zealand. Operating expenses fell on an adjusted basis, gross margins improved to 31%, and adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed, underscoring a disciplined growth strategy that appears to enhance MediPharm’s positioning in global regulated medical cannabis markets and support long-term value creation for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LABS) stock is a Hold with a C$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MediPharm Labs stock, see the TSE:LABS Stock Forecast page.

MediPharm Labs is a Toronto-based pharmaceutical company specializing in precision-based cannabinoid medicines.
